name: 두산
ai_analysis: 두산(000150.KS)에 대해 9명의 애널리스트가 적극 매수 의견(4.44/5.0)을 제시했습니다. 목표가 평균은 1,301,111 KRW으로 현재가 대비 4.1% 상승 여력이 있습니다. 이는 애널리스트들이 두산의 추가적인 주가 상승을 기대하고 있음을 나타냅니다.

news.title: Doosan selects ANDRITZ as supplier for pumped storage power plant in South Korea
news.summary: Doosan Enerbility has selected ANDRITZ to supply the pump turbine units for the new Yeongdong pumped storage plant in Chungcheong Province, South Korea.

news.title: Baird downgrades GEV on competition and power overcapacity fears
news.summary: Investing.com -- Baird analysts downgraded GE Vernova LLC (NYSE:GEV) to Neutral, citing rising concerns around potential overcapacity in the power equipment market.

news.title: Bobcat files patent lawsuits against Caterpillar over construction machinery tech
news.summary: The lawsuit filed in the Texas Eastern District Court involves patents associated with equipment technology.
